# llms.txt — OptiDemoCms (LLM Orientation)

You are operating inside the **OptiDemoCms** repository.

## What this project is
A demo site on **Optimizely CMS 12 / ASP.NET Core / .NET 8** focused on learning and practicing:
- Testing: integration tests (xUnit), E2E tests (Cypress, Playwright), API tests (Postman)
- Accessibility checks (WAVE)
- AI demo API integrations (Groq + Hugging Face), with demo mode responses

## Entry points
- `Program.cs`: host bootstrapping + Serilog
- `Startup.cs`: services + middleware + routing + status code re-execute

Local URL (typical): `https://localhost:5000` (see `Properties/launchSettings.json`)

## Core feature map (where to look)
### Content types (Optimizely)
- Pages: `Models/Pages/**`
- Blocks: `Models/Blokcs/**`  (NOTE: folder name is `Blokcs` in this repo)

### Rendering
- Page views: `Views/**/Index.cshtml`
- Shared layouts: `Views/Shared/_Layout.cshtml`, `Views/Shared/_PersonalLayout.cshtml`
- Block views: `Views/Shared/Blocks/*.cshtml`

### Controllers & routes
- `Controllers/StartPageController.cs`, `StandardPageController.cs`, etc.
- Search: `Controllers/SearchController.cs` + `Views/Search/Index.cshtml`
- 404/status codes: `Controllers/StatusCodeController.cs` + `Views/StatusCode/404.cshtml`
- Seed: `Controllers/SeedController.cs` and `Seed/**`
- AI API: `Controllers/AiApiController.cs` (or similarly named API controller)

### Observability / test hooks
- Health: `Health/**` provides `/health` and `/health/ready`
- Logging: Serilog config in `appsettings*.json` + program startup

## Routes you can rely on
Public:
- `/` (StartPage)
- `/search?q=...`
- `/health`, `/health/ready`
- `/about-me/`, `/ai-tools/`, `/my-hobbies/`, `/contact-me/`

Dev-only:
- `/seed/personal-pages` (create personal pages under StartPage)

AI demo API:
- `GET /api/ai/health`
- `POST /api/ai/complete`
- `POST /api/ai/summarize`
- `POST /api/ai/sentiment`

## Testing stack
- Integration tests: `OptiDemoCms.Tests` (xUnit + WebApplicationFactory)
- Cypress E2E: `cypress-e2e/` (Node, Cypress)
- Playwright E2E: `tests-playwright/` (Node, TS; public + CMS UI scaffolds)
- Postman collection: `postman/Optimizely-Demo-AI-API.postman_collection.json`

Prefer stable selectors:
- Use `data-testid` in views for Cypress/Playwright.

## Configuration and secrets (never commit secrets)
AI keys must come from:
- `Ai:GroqApiKey`, `Ai:HuggingFaceToken`
or environment:
- `Ai__GroqApiKey`, `Ai__HuggingFaceToken`

Demo mode works without keys; preserve that.

## Constraints / rules for changes
- Keep changes small and reviewable.
- If you modify UI behavior or page rendering, update at least one automated test.
- Do not redesign project structure unless explicitly asked.
- Maintain Windows-friendly local dev (LocalDB/SQL Server).
- Never remove or weaken `/health` and `/health/ready` semantics.

## How to validate work
Follow `TESTING.md` for exact commands and anti-flake rules.
